policy: Review flags are an auditable overlay. They never silently rewrite the immutable Gold Seed YAML.

flags.observation: HTTP 404 during advisory link audit; replacement must be verified by a human.
HTTP 404 during advisory link audit; replacement must be verified by a human.
HTTP 404 during advisory link audit; replacement must be verified by a human.
Human review required before promotion. Primary paper identified; maintainer should confirm publication year convention and final taxonomy wording.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed perspective located; final inclusion should check overlap with existing survey records.
Human review required before promotion. Canonical peer-reviewed end-to-end case; confirm whether any implementation or campaign data are publicly reusable.
Human review required before promotion. Strong end-to-end evidence; verify data availability and any reusable implementation before promotion.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed system and official repository found; repository scope and license need link audit.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed agent case with code; operational autonomy must remain none despite experimental validation.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed and code-backed; verify the exact wet-lab validation scope and repository license.
Human review required before promotion. Relevant biology agent with code and demo; maintain evidence grade B until peer-review status is rechecked.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed, code-backed experimental-design method; confirm exact biological use cases and data packaging.
Human review required before promotion. Recent peer-reviewed wet-lab optimization case; implementation and data availability require review.
Human review required before promotion. Foundational peer-reviewed perturbation model with open code; check current maintenance and canonical license metadata.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed model and official code located; verify license and supported datasets.
Human review required before promotion. Strong peer-reviewed virtual-perturbation resource; confirm license and current project ownership.
Human review required before promotion. Recent Science paper and Apache-2.0 code found; verify canonical repository redirect and any data release.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed method and code found; check repository license and exact experimental round structure.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed wet-lab platform; no canonical implementation was identified in the research pass.
Human review required before promotion. Recent Science paper, code, and model checkpoint source located; verify data/license mapping.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed prospective screen with official code; license and campaign-data download need review.
Human review required before promotion. Official consortium source located; add independent or publication evidence before promotion where possible.
Human review required before promotion. Two official facility sources found; publication, access model, and open-resource links need review.
Human review required before promotion. Official facility page located; add durable publications or technical documentation before promotion.
Human review required before promotion. Foundational protocol-language paper and historical official download found; archival status needs verification.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed benchmark and repository found; verify license, dataset split, and generated-protocol validation wording.
Human review required before promotion. Official/commercial sources located; verify current product name, ownership, availability, and feature claims.
Human review required before promotion. Current Siemens product sources found; confirm URLs, feature scope, and category against the live repository.
Human review required before promotion. Official repository found; maintenance, supported hardware, license, and publication evidence need audit.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed software and maintained repository found; verify current license and supported-device metadata.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed pipeline, code, and project site located; verify license and current workflow engine.
Human review required before promotion. Distinct from AAB-029; audit repository license and decide whether the 2016 paper remains the best canonical citation.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed method and GEO data found; implementation and exact feedback-round metadata need review.
Human review required before promotion. Published online in 2025 and assigned to a 2026 volume; verify year convention, source-data URL, and implementation availability.
Human review required before promotion. Official standard, peer-reviewed specification, and implementation organization found; select exact maintained libraries during review.
Human review required before promotion. Official specification and repository found; pin a reviewed specification version rather than implying all implementations are compatible.
Human review required before promotion. Established simulator with paper, code, and docs; verify current license and supported model standards.
Human review required before promotion. Paper, code, and documentation found; verify maintenance, license, and modern runtime compatibility.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed benchmark and licensed repository found; verify canonical dataset hosting and task coverage.
Human review required before promotion. Mature benchmark platform with paper, code, and site; audit dataset-level licenses separately.
Human review required before promotion. Recent peer-reviewed benchmark with code and reproducibility site; verify DOI resolution and dataset access.

Human review required before promotion. Strong system paper, but independent dataset packaging has not been confirmed; do not promote until data availability is audited. Shared DOI with related system AAB-054 is intentional system/dataset modeling; confirm an independently downloadable dataset and its license.

Human review required before promotion. Model separately only as a candidate dataset; verify an actual downloadable campaign dataset before promotion. Shared canonical URL, DOI, and repository with related method AAB-068 are intentional method/dataset modeling; confirm an independently downloadable campaign dataset and its license.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed platform, official site, and repository found; verify current license and supported model providers.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed API-query infrastructure with code and service found; audit current deployment and license.

flags.field: identity / urls / license / boundary_note_zh / autonomy / link_audit
flags.observation: Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed tool now under scverse; verify current license, module inventory, and repository redirect. The canonical URL returned a network fetch error during the 2026-07-19 advisory audit; retest from an unrestricted network.
Human review required before promotion. Peer-reviewed hardware and official project page found; canonical design repository and versioned license need audit.
Human review required before promotion. Paper, hardware/software repository, and documentation found; verify current bill of materials and licenses.
Human review required before promotion. Official/partner evidence found, but live product status and canonical company URL require careful audit.

flags.field: identity / resource_class / urls / license / boundary_note_zh / autonomy
flags.observation: Human review required before promotion. Official platform and peer-reviewed application evidence found; map claims conservatively and verify paper-platform identity. Mapped conservatively to enabling_infrastructure because commercial-platform automation does not establish a core autonomous system; maintainer must confirm platform identity and classification.
Human review required before promotion. Current official platform sources found; add project-level independent evidence and avoid broad autonomy claims.
Human review required before promotion. Official society source found; select stable community and education links during review.
Human review required before promotion. Official conference history located; verify current organizer, archival links, and recurring schedule.
Network fetch failed during the 2026-07-19 advisory audit. This is not a confirmed 404; a human should retest from an unrestricted network before restoring verified status.
Network fetch failed during the 2026-07-19 advisory audit. This is not a confirmed 404; a human should retest from an unrestricted network before restoring verified status.
